summary:
The Transplantation of Human Organs Act specifies that declaration of brainstem death requires specialized medical expertise; among the options, surgeons performing liver transplants lack appropriate qualifications due to their limited involvement with neurological assessments. Hence, Doctor D—likely referring to such a surgical specialist—is not legally authorized by THOA to make this determination. 

Note: This inference relies entirely upon general knowledge regarding medical practice standards rather than direct references from official legislation as per available sources.
